remarks: Stand alone building in the heart of South Norwalk, CT.  Featuring a fully equipped commercial kitchen (with exhaust) and walk-in cooler. New refrigerators, floors and split systems among many other improvements. About 50 % of the space is unused making ideal for expansion, or a secondary's business. Suitable for a neighborhood market including produce, deli, fast food. Dedicated on-site parking. Located within a thriving community near high-traffic areas. Agents to do their own due deligence.
